name: Ziti Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ziti according to package instructions and drain.
2. In a large bowl, combine Ricotta or cottage cheese, Mozzarella, Parmesan, egg, salt, and pepper.
3. Layer the cooked ziti, cheese mixture, and tomato sauce in a 13 x 9 x 2 inch casserole dish, starting and ending with the sauce.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes.
